name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: I was at the Cyber Security Symposium
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
You won't believe this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d4bf0cd20d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I have just spent the last couple of days in Sioux Falls with Mike Lindell for the Cybersecurity Symposium. [_Donate now to help me fight for election integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=64e62fb183&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b67d9fc31f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **What a whirlwind!**

Not even a day into the symposium and the live stream was already hacked...
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1d83ae3fee&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Folks, this isn’t a joke. There is something deeper at play – this is why we have been attacked every step of the way, the audit, myself, the campaign, and every patriot leading the charge in America’s Audit in Arizona.

[_Please donate TODAY to help us fight back against these attacks and make sure that our elections aren’t subject to the same assault! Donate $25, $50, $100, $250 or more today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=549b608593&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=974cb59861&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I want to break down to you why this is important.

**This means that the same key was applied to every county in every state. **

**_This is through publicly available data._**

When data is manipulated in the same way on the scale of the United States election, and the evidence is publicly available – either they think we’re idiots or they are more devious than we imagined.

**In either case, we cannot stand for this.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0980c58a14&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| What I need you to see here is that there is a huge movement building, and we are making tremendous strides.

**From the initial hearings which I paid for _out of pocket _,__ to the historic Maricopa election audit, to documented evidence of fraud on a massive scale and tens of thousands of fraudulent votes, to a movement that is spreading around the country, there is more than enough evidence to suggest what I have been saying all along:**

**_The 2020 election was stolen from Republicans and Donald Trump._**

And this has been due in no small part to help from each and every one of you.

At its heart, this is a grassroots movement, and I have been blessed to be put in a position where I can speak on your behalf. This is what I do on a daily basis, traveling around the country, supporting America First patriots, advocating for election integrity on television shows, the news, and radio shows.

**This is my calling, folks, to defend the America that I love.**

[**_And I just can’t do it without your continued support._**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c2538e29ad&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Donate today to support election integrity and my campaign for Arizona Secretary of State!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=28d965b2ba&e=44b8c466b0)

**There is a reason the #ProveIt movement is spreading like wildfire.**
**_More than half of America can’t be wrong._**

Cybersecurity specialists, election integrity patriots, constitutional defenders have gathered from around the country and reached a jarring but necessary conclusion.

_Our elections are only as safe as Republicans ensure that they are. Democrats can’t be trusted to protect our elections._

**This is why it is absolutely critical that I win the election for Secretary of State of Arizona in 2022.**

**_I am unafraid of the Radical Left, but I know what they are capable of. This is why I sleep with one eye open._**

So you don’t have to.

[**Will you help me?**

_Donate today to join the #ProveIt movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=45012b777c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6368714f71&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=73b73e0f5e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=63f170e307) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=63f170e307).
---

body:

**THE GOOD NEWS:** Polling shows Florida voters are sick of DeSantis and ready to replace him as their Governor.

**THE BAD NEWS:** _DeSantis is raising millions of dollars from extremist MAGA supporters around the nation -- and he 's going to use it to save his SINKING image._ [**That 's why we need to raise another $20,000 to our new Ad Fund to stop him from winning this reelection and then running for President. That would be a NIGHTMARE. Please, chip in $10 or more now! »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1974?t=9&akid=436%2E564421%2EcmZxQj) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [$10 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1975?t=10&akid=436%2E564421%2EcmZxQj) | [$25 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1976?t=11&akid=436%2E564421%2EcmZxQj)

The truth is, we've only begun in our fight to take down DeSantis.

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132779:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132779:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132779:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132779:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, friend. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132779:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132779:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132779:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132779:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132781:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132780:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132782:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132783:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132784:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132785:6i8Gb5lgN:m:1:3253819041:13DA5C72916166B3DE21908C56471C16:r)
---|---|---

name: Right USA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Teaching the truth about civil rights in America
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132942:6o-Dl5lNO:m:1:3253819041:0A0D77EF6920AD395A19A316CF564635:r) Peter, There is a growing movement to teach young Americans that our nation's history is **oppressive** and **shameful** --that the essential fact of American history is not freedom but slavery. **To counter this false and destructive narrative, Hillsdale College has produced a new free online course, "Civil Rights in American History," which is now available in a special DVD box set.** This course covers the Founders' understanding of equality, natural rights, and civil rights; the quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during Reconstruction, and in the 20th century; and the danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity politics. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132942:6o-Dl5lNO:m:1:3253819041:0A0D77EF6920AD395A19A316CF564635:r) **You can help promote "Civil Rights in American History" and receive a DVD box set of this timely and important new course by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today.** We produce free online courses, as we do all of our work, while refusing to accept government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We rely entirely on the support of private citizens who agree with our mission on behalf of liberty. Please help promote Hillsdale's free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for America by giving your best gift today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible donation below: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-civil-rights-in-american-history-dvd](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132942:6o-Dl5lNO:m:1:3253819041:0A0D77EF6920AD395A19A316CF564635:r)** There are only a limited number of "**Civil Rights in American History** " DVD box sets available, so reserve your copy before they are gone. Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Peter, There is a growing movement to teach young Americans that our nation's history is oppressive and shameful --that the essential fact of American history is not freedom but slavery. To counter this false and destructive narrative, Hillsdale College has produced a new free online course, "Civil Rights in American History," which is now available in a special DVD box set. This course covers the Founders' understanding of equality, natural rights, and civil rights; the quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during Reconstruction, and in the 20th century; and the danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity politics. You can help promote "Civil Rights in American History" and receive a DVD box set of this timely and important new course by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today. We produce free online courses, as we do all of our work, while refusing to accept government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We rely entirely on the support of private citizens who agree with our mission on behalf of liberty. Please help promote Hillsdale's free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for America by giving your best gift today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible donation below: There are only a limited number of "Civil Rights in American History " DVD box sets available, so reserve your copy before they are gone. Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under attack from the Woke Mob
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133032:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133032:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133032:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133032:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, friend. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133032:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133032:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133032:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133032:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133034:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133033:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133035:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133036:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133037:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58133038:JkM1E5lN5:m:1:3253819041:0F5DAEE648A4F6229038E31350EC53F8:r)

Abbott over ban on mask mandates.”[3](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI3LTYzYmZkNGE0NTc3YTQ2MmM4OGM3MTU0Nzg1ZDA4YTY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3AX2Z0bnJlZjM%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua3RyZS5jb20vMjAyMS8wOC8xMC90d28tdGV4YXMtbW9zdC1wb3B1bG91cy1jb3VudGllcy1zdWUtZ292LWFiYm90dC1vdmVyLWJhbi1tYXNrLW1hbmRhdGVzLz9taWQ9NDQxODUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=oq8VEOx0pzIdDl_77rL3nQ)** **“Forty percent of migrants released in Texas border city test positive for COVID-19, officials say.”[4](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI3LTYzYmZkNGE0NTc3YTQ2MmM4OGM3MTU0Nzg1ZDA4YTY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3AX2Z0bnJlZjQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS9uZXdzL3RleGFzLWNpdHktb2ZmaWNpYWxzLTQwLW9mLW1pZ3JhbnRzLXRlc3QtcG9zaXRpdmUtZm9yLWNvdmlkLTE5P21pZD00NDE4NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=mJ3GxXqI1JepHLiPeMX57A)** And finally, this is graffiti in Germany in 2021: **“GAS THE UNVACCINATED.”[5](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI3LTYzYmZkNGE0NTc3YTQ2MmM4OGM3MTU0Nzg1ZDA4YTY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3AX2Z0bnJlZjU%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9DSkhvcGtpbnNfWjIzL3N0YXR1cy8xNDI1OTM1MjI0MjY1OTA0MTI5P21pZD00NDE4NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=aOGYIDYMDjruQ-o5DEgIdA)** Do you see what is happening? Do you think it will get _easier_ to fight whatever is coming next? Every step toward totalitarianism makes it harder to win the fight. The time has come for you and I to Just Say No to medical mandates, and YES to liberty and freedom. **America desperately needs you to step up and organize a Just Say No protest in your city on Saturday, August 28th. Don’t worry if you’ve never organized one before. We will help you every step of the way. We have a detailed how-to guide available for download, as well as multiple conference calls scheduled between now and August 28th.** We do not have the luxury of waiting to see how it will all turn out. We do not have the luxury of going along with these mandates and hoping the next incursions on our basic human rights won’t be as bad. The time is now. [**Sign up to host a protest today.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI3LTYzYmZkNGE0NTc3YTQ2MmM4OGM3MTU0Nzg1ZDA4YTY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xg4JWkOU1Z2oV_qnEJ8RLw) And remember, you have the authority and power and right to **JUST SAY NO!** [HOST A PROTEST](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI3LTYzYmZkNGE0NTc3YTQ2MmM4OGM3MTU0Nzg1ZDA4YTY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=XMcQ3BvqhCRjv5bB8BC2dg) And, please consider supporting these efforts [with a gift of $25, $50, $100, or any amount you can give](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI3LTYzYmZkNGE0NTc3YTQ2MmM4OGM3MTU0Nzg1ZDA4YTY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9mdW5kMT0yNSZmdW5kMj01MCZmdW5kMz0xMDAmbWlkPTQ0MTg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=SIGfnusuNFrKTlDRA1hqJA), so that we can continue to provide resources and support to American patriots across the nation. It doesn’t get easier. The time is now. Say YES to liberty and freedom today! Jenny Beth Martin | |

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: need input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
50,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: I just launched my August Priorities Survey. I’m counting on grassroots Democrats’ feedback to guide me. Before MIDNIGHT, could you spare 30 seconds and take my critical August Priorities Survey? I need your feedback to be the first I hear. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/00tGa_bhTk65J-9vC2k2_Q2?source=20210815_em_pet_b1_np_30]

I just launched my August Priorities Survey.

Now, more than ever, I need your feedback to guide our Democrats through this critical chapter in our country’s history.

It would mean so much to me if you’d take 30 seconds to share your priorities with me and tell me what Democrats should prioritize right now. I’m relying on your input now more than ever. Will you help me reach 50,000 responses so I can get an accurate sample size of results? >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/00tGa_bhTk65J-9vC2k2_Q2?source=20210815_em_pet_b1_np_30]

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.comTAKE MY SURVEY >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/00tGa_bhTk65J-9vC2k2_Q2?source=20210815_em_pet_b1_np_30]

I only have one ask to make of you:

Democrats are in our first summer with control of the House, Senate, and presidency. Will you take 30 seconds to share your feedback and tell me what you want Democrats to focus on right now? I need 50,000 responses before midnight to get an accurate sample size. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/00tGa_bhTk65J-9vC2k2_Q2?source=20210815_em_pet_b1_np_30]

dpwillis67@gmail.comAUGUST PRIORITIES SURVEY RESPONSE: NOT RECORDED
PLEASE TAKE MY SURVEY BEFORE MIDNIGHT >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/00tGa_bhTk65J-9vC2k2_Q2?source=20210815_em_pet_b1_np_30]

We've accomplished a lot:
-- Vaccinated millions of Americans
-- Created millions of jobs
-- Financial support for everyone affected by COVID-19

But we're about to face:
-- Trump's THREATS to run for president
-- A DEADLOCKED Senate
-- And a HISTORICALLY narrow margin in the House

At this critical crossroads, I need to hear from my strongest supporters. It would mean so much if you could take 30 seconds right now to tell me your priorities for the rest of this summer. I need 50,000 responses before midnight to make sure we’re ready to go. Will you take my survey now? >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/00tGa_bhTk65J-9vC2k2_Q2?source=20210815_em_pet_b1_np_30]

I couldn’t do this without you,
Nancy

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34097665/300908131/683353327?refcode=20210815_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2VhOGEwOS1kZGZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFdrFw-FK-DlJqVYXKp4gbRW8eQNSzUrU_t_qGiZFSE=) Friend — Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand: **FIRST:** Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats. **THEN:** Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a _sweeping_ voter suppression bill so restrictive that Stacey Abrams calls it "Jim Crow 2.0." **NOW:** Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights — and _CNN_ confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first ever Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights — but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: the stakes of this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, I didn’t think the stakes in my U.S. Senate re-election race could get any higher, but Mitch McConnell has other ideas. You wouldn’t believe what he plans to do if Republicans take back the Senate majority. He says that he will veto President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. Let me say that again: _If there’s an opening on the Supreme Court, Mitch McConnell has promised to stop President Biden from filling it._ The Senate majority comes down to our race in New Hampshire, and it’s sure to be one of the closest in the country. **[Please rush $5 or more to protect this vulnerable Senate seat and Democrats’ fragile Senate majority before our mid-month deadline. We still have $10,512 left to raise, so this can’t wait.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34099485/300915568/565612021?refcode=e20210815_mwh-mm&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ4MWI1Ni1lMmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AhLq-_rLA9QevVmuPVZkYF0KAwmKpQbvDw_I5ZiRCfo=)** Mitch McConnell knows that beating me in New Hampshire is his best chance at regaining the majority and pulling off his Supreme Court power grab. **[That’s why I need you to please help me protect the future of the Supreme Court by donating $5 or more today to my re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34099486/300915569/565612021?refcode=e20210815_mwh-mm&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ4MWI1Ni1lMmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AhLq-_rLA9QevVmuPVZkYF0KAwmKpQbvDw_I5ZiRCfo=)** I can’t thank you enough for everything you’ve done for my campaign so far. But with Mitch McConnell playing politics with the Supreme Court – and with Republicans across the country zeroed in on New Hampshire – I need your continued support to keep building my re-election campaign. It’s no secret that I’m Mitch McConnell’s top Senate target. He’s trying to recruit my opponent. His super PAC allies are attacking me. **Our opponents haven’t forgotten that I won my last race by just 1,017 votes and flipped a red seat blue. They won’t let up until they run me out of the Senate.** If we let them win, Mitch McConnell will be the majority leader. He’ll abuse that power to block President Biden’s nominees to the Supreme Court – just like he did during the Obama administration. We can’t let him get away with it. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Enclosed: John Fetterman in a dunk tank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
On big fundraising deadlines, John has to spend time fundraising — but since it's his and Grace's birthday, we really don't want that to be the case.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210815-2288-header&t=1&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)
Peter,
We're reaching out to you today for three important reasons:
1. It's John Fetterman's 52nd birthday.
2. It's also Grace Fetterman's 10th birthday.
3. Tonight marks our critical August mid-month fundraising deadline.

On most big fundraising deadlines, John has to spend time focused on grassroots fundraising.
But since today is John _and_ his daughter Grace's birthday, we really don't want that to be the case. We want them to be able to spend the day doing fun, celebratory activities.
You know, stuff like this. 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27805?refcode=em20210815-2288&t=2&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)
_Grace dunking John in the dunk tank._
That's why we're aiming to raise $7,834 in the next three hours so we can close the gap on our mid-month fundraising goal — **without John having to spend time working on his + Grace's big day.**
[**_Will you donate $10 in honor of Grace's birthday, $52 in honor of John's birthday, or ANY amount you can to help reach our mid-month goal? We're hoping to raise $7,834 in the next three hours so the Fettermans can spend the day celebrating — not worrying about fundraising._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27805?refcode=em20210815-2288&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27805?refcode=em20210815-2288&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)**
John has spent the past six months campaigning tirelessly to flip this seat — and nearly two decades before that working to improve the lives of working Pennsylvanians. So we think giving him the day off from fundraising is the least we can do on his + Grace's special day.
Family means the world to John, so we know that giving him the day off from fundraising today is the #1 best gift we could give him. **But we really can't afford to come up short of our mid-month goal with our first office opening at the end of the summer, so we're hoping you can pitch in what you can to help close the gap on our goal in the next three hours.**
[**_Please donate $10 in honor of Grace's birthday, $52 in honor of John's birthday, or ANY amount you can to help reach our mid-month goal. We're so thankful for your support today and every day (and we're positive that John would be grateful to hear we hit our goal so he can take the day off to celebrate with family.)_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27805?refcode=em20210815-2288&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)
Let's do this!
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Our team at Fetterman HQ is pushing really hard to give John and Grace the best joint birthday gift of all: A day off to have fun and celebrate with family. [** _Anything would be so deeply appreciated — $10, $52, or any amount that fits your budget. Will you chip in today to help meet our goal?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27805?refcode=em20210815-2288&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)__

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210815-2288-footer&t=25&refcode2=2288_434096_AFS1uB&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2288%2E434096%2EAFS1uB)

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: looks like we might fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We're only about 80% of the way to our goal
#

Hey,
In just a moment, we're going to ask you to make a $3 contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign for U.S. Senate. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here's the truth:
We launched a 72-hour fundraising drive to keep our fundraising on pace before tonight's mid-quarter deadline.
**But right now, we're only about 80% of the way to our goal of 1,000 donations, and it looks like we might fall short.**
Pennsylvania's open Senate seat is going to be the most competitive race of 2022, and it will be tough to stay competitive if we don't hit our fundraising goals.
So we're asking you to pitch in. We can't do this alone.
[Can Malcolm count on you to make a $3 contribution before our deadline tonight? body:

Glenn Youngkin just announced his education plan, and Derek, it looks straight out of the Donald Trump/Betsy DeVos playbook.

He’s following DeVos’ lead and instead of strengthening Virginia public education, he wants to defund the Commonwealth’s already underfunded schools.

clean_body: They want to defund public schools! | | | Glenn Youngkin just announced his education plan, and Derek, it looks straight out of the Donald Trump/Betsy DeVos playbook. He’s following DeVos’ lead and instead of strengthening Virginia public education, he wants to defund the Commonwealth’s already underfunded schools. Derek -- Virginia has been known for quality schools, and we need to be fully funding our children’s education, not ripping away their schools’ budgets. Together, we can make Virginia have the best public education in America, but first, we need to stop Glenn Youngkin. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Illegal Release
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| |
---
Peter:

Did you see the news?

**Joe Biden released 50,000 illegal immigrants into the United States without even giving them a court date. **

We don't know how many are violent criminals, how many work for the drug cartels, or how many are infected with Covid-19. All we know is that the Left's plan is working.

They don't see the lawless humanitarian crisis on the border as the problem. **To Democrats, the crisis _is_ the solution. **

**[ONLY A CONSERVATIVE HOUSE CAN SEAL THE BORDER. CLICK HERE TO GIVE TO HOUSE FREEDOM FUND TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132657:Jg7U-5lrN:m:1:3253819041:95404255D2EC55674483C851EB388A5A:r)**

Democrats _**want**_ chaos at the border so that they can sneak in as many illegals as possible, right under your nose. So far, more than _**1 MILLION**_ illegals have crossed the border since Joe Biden took office!

Biden isn't turning them back to Mexico. He's letting them into our towns, without Covid tests or court dates, while telling American citizens we have to start wearing masks again!

**What happened to our country?** America belongs to the people who love her, and it's time to take her back.

**[Support the House Freedom Fund today, and join the fight to win America back.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132657:Jg7U-5lrN:m:1:3253819041:95404255D2EC55674483C851EB388A5A:r)**

HFF is the only organization in the country exclusively committed to electing **TRUE CONSERVATIVES** to the U.S. House.

HFF only supports fighters - men and women like Jim Jordan, Scott Perry, and Lauren Boebert. These are leaders ready to take on the socialist Left, the establishment GOP, the Big Tech billionaires, and the mainstream media.

**I know because HFF supports me, and that's no small thing. I've learned that when conservatives truly fight the liberals, even many of the leaders in our own party will abandon them.**

Electing more Republicans won't change anything. Only electing conservatives can make the House great again. HFF is the Right's secret weapon against the woke socialist Left.

As you know, under our Constitution, the House holds the _**power of the purse**_ over the federal budget. If we nominate and elect enough conservatives next year, we can cut off Biden's allowance:

❌ No more money to relocate illegal immigrants into our hometowns;
❌ No more money to poison our children with Critical Race Theory;
❌ No more money to get Big Tech to spy on American citizens;
❌ No more money for new mask mandates or school closures; and
❌ No more money to finance coronavirus experiments by Communist scientists in Chinese labs.

If Democrats won't turn away illegal immigrants, then the American people have to turn away the Democrats.

**[Please join me in supporting HFF today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132657:Jg7U-5lrN:m:1:3253819041:95404255D2EC55674483C851EB388A5A:r)**

Thank you for considering this urgent request and doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
U.S. Congresswoman (R-GA)

Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment.

Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Our first full fundraising quarter is about halfway over
#

Our first full fundraising quarter is about halfway over, so I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why a $3 donation to our campaign today is so important.
At the end of this quarter, we have our second official FEC deadline, and when this deadline ends, **we are required to report our fundraising numbers.** We’ll do it if they are good, and we’ll do it if they are not.
The truth is everyone will be watching for our numbers — the press, our primary opponents, and the Republican Party. They all want to see if we can keep up our momentum because that's what it will take to flip this seat and expand Democrats’ majority.
Right now we are working to earn a lot more donations before this quarter ends. There’s still time to reach our goal, but only if we can get a surge of support to put us back on track.
**[Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign for U.S. Senate to make sure we can report a strong number after our next FEC fundraising deadline? I would not ask if this were not critical.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34107277/300929134/-928165870?refcode2=b2b09095-eefd-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210815-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmIwOTA5NS1lZWZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUn2dVRlnUUMpY54sLTYT4jv8yU7k4kkR6Re75Nwt0I=)**
We know there’s a lot at stake in this race. But if we work hard and keep the faith, we can deliver meaningful change and progress on health care, voting rights, climate change and so much more for our families.
With gratitude,
Cheri

clean_body: Our first full fundraising quarter is about halfway over Our first full fundraising quarter is about halfway over, so I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why a $3 donation to our campaign today is so important. At the end of this quarter, we have our second official FEC deadline, and when this deadline ends, we are required to report our fundraising numbers. We’ll do it if they are good, and we’ll do it if they are not. The truth is everyone will be watching for our numbers — the press, our primary opponents, and the Republican Party. They all want to see if we can keep up our momentum because that's what it will take to flip this seat and expand Democrats’ majority. Right now we are working to earn a lot more donations before this quarter ends. There’s still time to reach our goal, but only if we can get a surge of support to put us back on track. = We know there’s a lot at stake in this race. But if we work hard and keep the faith, we can deliver meaningful change and progress on health care, voting rights, climate change and so much more for our families. name: Team NHGOP
subject: This Saturday: Belknap County FUNdraiser with Senator Rick Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Get your tickets today!
Derek,
|
---
| | Belknap County Republicans are excited to invite you to join them for their annual FUNdraiser Gala at our pristine county owned Gunstock Mountain Resort, **Saturday, August 21st**. Thanks to the help of Matt Mowers, our Special Guest speaker will be Florida's **Senator Rick Scott**. The schedule for the evening is listed below. You will also enjoy great food, music, dancing, live auction and a silent auction. This event allows guests to enjoy the entire Gunstock lodge facility with the meal and activities happening in the main lodge and guests can step outside to the beautiful patio for a spectacular sunset. We hope you will attend this summer evening of fun with some of NH's great Patriots! All proceeds from our annual fundraiser are used to help elect Republican candidates.

**Gala Menu:** salad, grilled steak tips, baked haddock, veggies, roasted potatoes and dessert

**Tickets:** $65.00 each

**Sponsorships: **( all levels will be advertised at our event )
The Belknap - $2500.00 (includes 10 free tickets, Reserved seating )
The Gunstock - $1,000.00 ( includes 6 free tickets, Reserved seating )
The Piper - $500.00 ( included 4 free tickets )
The Mount Major - $250.00 ( includes 2 free tickets )

*****
Tickets and Sponsorships can be purchased online at the link below

[https://www.eventcreate.com/e/bcrccountrygala](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feventcreate.us6.list-manage.com%2Ftrack%2Fclick%3Fu=6a3ee64bc871f6fe53aba57dc%26id=86ff442ad6%26e=020e4890ce/1/0100017b4a124950-6f0ac8b8-28ec-466f-ada8-dc9edbfbf4fa-000000/cItsGl6eVIbBrWV_K3RO5OitqUM=231)

If you have any questions about the event or sponsorships please contact Beth Varney at 603-765-6382.

*****
The LIVE Auction will include a 9mm handgun and a hat signed by President Trump

The Silent Auction will include items signed by Lt General Michael Flynn, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, several additional signed books from prominent Republicans including Don Jr, Diamond & Silk, Congressman Steve Scalise, Newt Gingrich and more...

We will also be raffling off one of President Trump's autographed books.

*****
**Schedule**

**5 p.m.**
**People arriving / Cocktails / Games / Silent auction begins**

**5:38 p.m.**
**Guest Speaker is introduced**

**5:40 p.m.**
**Remarks from Senator Scott**

**6 p.m.**
**Dinner Bell! Prayer and Blessing by Pastor Sam**
**Gala Menu : salad, grilled steak tips, baked haddock, veggies, roasted potatoes and dessert**

**7:00 p.m.**
**Live Auction / reminder silent auction to end at 9 p.m.**

**8 p.m. ~ 10 p.m.**
**Dancing begins **

**9 p.m.**
**Silent auction ends / winners announced**

*****
Senator Rick Scott is chairman of the National Senatorial Committee, serves on the Armed Services Committee, Commerce Science and Transportation, Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs, Budget Committee and on the Seniors and Aging Committee

*****
**Event Location:**
**Gunstock Mountain Resort** **(Main Lodge)**
**719 Cherry Valley Rd**
**Gilford, NH**

“All solicitations of funds in connection with this event are by the Belknap County Republicans and not by Senator Scott.”
---

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee
---
10 Water Street, Concord, New Hampshire, 03301, United States of America
[secure.nh.gop](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fsecure.nh.gop/1/0100017b4a124950-6f0ac8b8-28ec-466f-ada8-dc9edbfbf4fa-000000/rKTPAGLt_Z-iEE8ziFAxuq93Eac=231) | [Unsubscribe from this list](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fpress.nh.gop%2Funsubscribe%3Fep=1%26l=605be9a3-8e32-11eb-a3d0-06b4694bee2a%26lc=a59b6aac-8e32-11eb-a3d0-06b4694bee2a%26p=30aaea5f-fdce-11eb-96e5-06b4694bee2a%26pt=campaign%26pv=4%26spa=1629034792%26t=1629035317%26s=a0757b096f7a65606a67aa766b4bbeb99378bcadf5368399d0576e0fe87f6b19/1/0100017b4a124950-6f0ac8b8-28ec-466f-ada8-dc9edbfbf4fa-000000/lNLMnXTX4SOGAmPFbKN1-QGEKQc=231)

name: Erica Smith
subject: re: tonight’s mid-month deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I promise to make this quick.
#
It’s Sunday, and I wouldn’t be emailing you if it weren’t important. But, I promise to make this quick.
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, and thanks to the wonderful grassroots supporters like you on this team, **we’re just $554 away from reaching our $3,391 goal!!**
We’re cutting it close, but I KNOW this team can move mountains if we all come together.

From defending Trump’s Big Lie, to headlining a radical “election integrity” rally, to suggesting that Trump could be reinstated as president , Glenn Youngkin is pushing Donald Trump’s most extreme, anti-democratic ideas.

We desperately need to defend our democracy and we’re asking for your help to do it. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It’s as simple as this, Derek: anyone who undermines the right to vote should be disqualified from leading in our democracy. name: Chief James Craig
subject: disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r) | |
---
Peter,

**What is the Left 's response to our concerns about rising crime in the wake of the Defund the Police movement?**

__**Tell us to "suck it up."**__

I'm not exaggerating. That is a DIRECT quote from Rep. Cori Bush, one of the most outspoken advocates of defunding the police.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)

It's shameful. It's just another example of the "rules for thee and not for me" politicians across this country.

**My name is Chief James Craig, and I am the former Detroit Chief of Police. Not only do I reject the call to "Defund the Police," I believe we have a public safety crisis in America - and it's time we gave the police even MORE support.**

We all deserve to feel safe in our communities - not just those who can afford their own private security.

Peter, it's past time that our leaders started taking our public safety crisis seriously. I believe it's time to act.

And it's part of why the Michigan governor's race is attracting national attention: because I'm a veteran police chief who is unafraid to stand up to the elites when it comes to our police.

I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of that team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)**
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

**And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!"**

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132698:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132699:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132700:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132701:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

_P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-171745](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132697:JJ75d5laN:m:1:3253819041:2AFD0F39C1C14617B71342EAFF848AE3:r)**_

Trump is on the campaign trail right now attacking US Capitol Police for protecting our nation's Capitol Building during the Jan. 6th attack that he helped instigate.

Capitol Police went through hell that day -- they were assaulted, beaten, stabbed, and in some cases killed. In return, they're being threatened and attacked by Trump and other far-right Republicans. It's disgusting.

**Of course, our opponent Kevin McCarthy is completely silent.** I'm sick of seeing our US Capitol Police disrespected, and McCarthy continuing to allow it. It's cowardly, and it's got to stop. Now.

Hi again,
If you follow my mom on social media, you know this was my first week back to school. (Seriously, moms are so embarrassing 🤦♀️ )
Going to school online this past year was really hard for a lot of us, and I'm so excited to see my friends and favorite teachers in person again. **Now if only everyone would join leaders like my mom in advocating for the science and guidelines that will help keep my friends and I safe all school year. **🙄 🙄 🙄
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34110736/300940402/558373307?refcode=X_081421_HeleneBackToSchool&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzFiMzAxNS1mYmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCQadCEnNzyMEzvNwlX_sOf0X_YJEXkWNY337ZxbKLE=)
---
The science doesn't lie. We know these guidelines work. And we need as many people as possible to follow them so we can all get back to our lives safely.
[**That's why I want to ask you to pitch in a few dollars to my mom's campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34110740/300940404/558373307?refcode=X_081421_HeleneBackToSchool&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzFiMzAxNS1mYmZkLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCQadCEnNzyMEzvNwlX_sOf0X_YJEXkWNY337ZxbKLE=)
We need leaders in Congress who believe in the science and trust the experts who have spent their entire careers keeping us safe and healthy. I promise my dad is the only scientist she occasionally might not listen to - and only when it comes to things like the 'correct way' to fold laundry.
Anyway, if you believe schools should be able to follow the science and do everything they can to keep us safe, please chip in to my mom's campaign.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Bad News
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends — we have some good news and some bad news. Let us explain quickly.
**The bad news is:** The NSSF is gaining ground as a major influencer in the NRA’s absence. They’ve proven they can sway Congress just like the NRA, and if left unchecked, they’d be a big detriment to our mission.
**The good news is:** The NSSF is using the same NRA playbook, so we know how to go head-to-head with them and win. We just need your help!
**This team is powered by generous folks like you who give $3, $5 or even $10 to emails just like this. So if you can, please consider making a donation today:**
[**If you are able, will you chip in $3 today to help us go head-to-head with the NSSF? We are still so close to enacting change — real change — for our communities and we can’t afford to lose that opportunity now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210815-1-15&t=1&refcode2=478_3935704_7Hiltk&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210815-1-15&t=20&refcode2=478_3935704_7Hiltk&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210815-1-15&t=21&refcode2=478_3935704_7Hiltk&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210815-1-15&t=22&refcode2=478_3935704_7Hiltk&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210815-1-15&t=23&refcode2=478_3935704_7Hiltk&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210815-1-15&t=24&refcode2=478_3935704_7Hiltk&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210815-1-15&t=25&refcode2=478_3935704_7Hiltk&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk)**
---
****
Both the NRA and the NSSF will go to extreme lengths to prevent us from making real change, prioritizing corporate profits over saving lives.
But we've gone toe-to-toe with groups like this before — the simple fact that the NRA is a shell of what it once was is a huge testament to the strength of our movement.
And we know that if all of us fight back, we will defeat them and end their influence over Washington for good.
Thank you so much for supporting the work we’re doing,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210815-1-15&t=26&refcode2=478_3935704_7Hiltk&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=478%2E3935704%2E7Hiltk) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
Paul Gosar is more vulnerable in this election than he has been at any time in the past decade.

| I hate to bother you on a Sunday, so I’ll keep this short. Tonight is our mid-quarter fundraising deadline, and we’re still short of our goal. Can you chip in just $5 right now to get us back on track?

Here’s a secure link you can use to make a contribution: [_**delinadisanto.com/midquartergoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34112122/300944256/-1204788432?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210815-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTg4Y2MzNC0wMmZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BH5fxdQrpnkYfsTyfBVnMQ-_jdGt4m5BBiZhbgBsNDE=)

I hear from a lot of people that they don’t think we can defeat Paul Gosar. But here’s the truth, friend: Paul Gosar is more vulnerable in this election than he has been at any time in the past decade. In the past year he’s spread baseless conspiracy theories about a “stolen election,” incited an insurrection, and become so extreme that even members of his own party won’t work with him anymore.

I know I can defeat him — as long as I have you on my team. One more time, here’s that secure link to donate ahead of tonight’s deadline: [_**delinadisanto.com/midquartergoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34112123/300944257/-1204788432?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210815-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTg4Y2MzNC0wMmZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BH5fxdQrpnkYfsTyfBVnMQ-_jdGt4m5BBiZhbgBsNDE=)

Thank you,
Delina

body:

Friends — we just have one question before the weekend comes to an end.
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots campaign today? Look, you might think that the 2022 Election is a long ways away.
But the reality is, our Senate majority is hanging on by a thread, and Republicans are doing everything they can to make sure we lose it. From organizing the recall in California, to stalling our progress in the Senate by using the filibuster.
We’re under attack from all sides and the stakes could not be higher. We know we can fight back and keep Alex in the Senate, but we can’t do it alone.

Team Padilla

Hi there — Rebecca here. Martin has been hard at work fighting for policies that will make a real difference for New Mexico’s workers and families. That's why he fought so hard to pass this once-in-a-generation infrastructure package and is doing the same for the budget reconciliation that will take the bold climate action future generations are counting on. Fighting for New Mexico and our country is his number one job. Meanwhile, I’m here to make sure we reach each and every fundraising goal so he can keep up his work in the U.S. Senate and across New Mexico. So here’s where I need your help. We have to stay on track to meet our quarterly fundraising goal. clean_body: Hi there — Rebecca here. Martin has been hard at work fighting for policies that will make a real difference for New Mexico’s workers and families. That's why he fought so hard to pass this once-in-a-generation infrastructure package and is doing the same for the budget reconciliation that will take the bold climate action future generations are counting on. Fighting for New Mexico and our country is his number one job. Meanwhile, I’m here to make sure we reach each and every fundraising goal so he can keep up his work in the U.S. Senate and across New Mexico. So here’s where I need your help. We have to stay on track to meet our quarterly fundraising goal. But we're almost halfway through the quarter, and I just looked at the numbers — we're $10,083 short of where we should be at this point. So, will you chip in $5, $10, or any amount that works for you to help us hit our mid-quarter goal tomorrow? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Our quarterly goals aren't arbitrary. We turn to this grassroots team to help fund our work — from investing $30,000 in New Mexico county parties, to helping defend our Senate majority from the Republicans who've raised $58 million to try to take back control. We’ll put your donation right to work, so please: chip in whatever you can before our mid-quarter deadline expires tomorrow: If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your support. —Rebecca | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. Team, Today is our August mid-month deadline and in just a moment, we’ll share some truly _astounding_ numbers all thanks to grassroots donors like you — the kind of momentum that is going to get us to our goal. [But if you’re running low on time, can you chip in whatever you can now and help us hit our $40,000 mid-month goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoJTScIA4n5e-Rkzg7B9UsOeNSH2FgJ5sF0topMgeSIY93ZZQddpQiq7QnYkjXlgK5XFzw0ypKbWxuDqWcbJ7RU4PNY5b6YLnMTgLXy_bdDzW8bip4ImFdpivwTLlh7C3iKGYZMO0KRm_VBdL3y9vdPKcBkkigTBQ-6LbxvIuIVPCdG9tHjmyHPMxjWTwdagq9UoGpFm1RbEjuN0p9HM-EMWj15_FAR_9EUyltt1S50e9qyuR9Dln3jv5GjOdMbLVG/3eh/l2l_Y5ARQ3aWHnSp_uOQgw/h0/QhRsTHZ9Wtyu8gLqLYh3ZeSHeEeiqN03SAQvbsw8pQE) There’s no doubt about it, team. **Our movement is growing**. Just a month ago, hundreds of folks had chipped in to help us raise just under $10,000 during the first two weeks of July. Right now, we’re on track to hit $40,000 in the first two weeks of August by midnight — _and_ _that won’t happen without you_. Our average donation size in August so far is $19. No corporate PACs funneling in money to inflate our numbers here, team. We know how hard it is to beat them firsthand: last year a Republican extremist ran against Josh, and let's just say it's hard to debate when one side won't use facts. subject: Working around the clock
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**FIRST:** Last month, CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
**THEN:** Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
**NOW:** We’re working around the clock to hit our fundraising goal this month. We need to have a strong month now that Trump and McConnell are ramping up the pressure against us.
**If we can keep up the momentum, it’ll show our opponents that we’re serious about keeping Mark in the Senate and holding this seat. So here’s the part where we ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to defend Mark and hold this seat in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210815-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1148_6688874_cILR8l&akid=1148%2E6688874%2EcILR8l)

body:
We can’t win back the Majority without North Carolina.

| The North Carolina Republican Party is doing everything we can to Keep NC Red in 2022, because we know that whichever party wins in the Tar Heel State will win the House & Senate Majorities. We’re glad to have you on the team, Peter. To update your email preferences, [click here](http://www.nc.gop/email_preferences?e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=707043126633339239_p&n=1).
---
We’re thrilled that we reached you, Peter. _We really need your help._ If we’re going to win back the Republican Senate Majority in the Midterm Elections, **we need to win here in the battleground state of North Carolina.** But the folks on the Left are going to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. You can bet on it. Right now, they are spending millions of dollars in the state -- money they’ve raised from the most liberal communities in America. They want to transform “red states” like North Carolina into socialist states like California! North Carolina came through in a MAJOR way for President Trump in 2020\. clean_body: We can’t win back the Majority without North Carolina. | The North Carolina Republican Party is doing everything we can to Keep NC Red in 2022, because we know that whichever party wins in the Tar Heel State will win the House & Senate Majorities. We’re glad to have you on the team, Peter. To update your email preferences, . We’re thrilled that we reached you, Peter. We really need your help. If we’re going to win back the Republican Senate Majority in the Midterm Elections, we need to win here in the battleground state of North Carolina. But the folks on the Left are going to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. You can bet on it. Right now, they are spending millions of dollars in the state -- money they’ve raised from the most liberal communities in America. They want to transform “red states” like North Carolina into socialist states like California! North Carolina came through in a MAJOR way for President Trump in 2020\. But without your help, it could fall to the Left. | | | | | | If we don’t stand together, the Democrats will win. You can count on that, Peter. Big Tech and the Mainstream Media are doing everything they can to ensure that the Left wins. But we know that if Grassroots Republicans can out-campaign them -- if we work together. | Thank you. name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Reminder: Heidi St. John is in the news again and an update on medical freedom.
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friends,
Washington State has never felt less free. Do you feel it, too?
The un-scientific and draconian mask mandates are back. Our K-12 employees are being told they must get an experimental vaccine or risk losing their jobs. Our health care workers and first responders, who just a few short months ago were hailed as heroes for their front line work, are being threatened with loss of employment for simply wanting bodily autonomy. The freedom to choose what is best for their own bodies is the new civil rights issue of our day.
The United States medical theocracy, under the direction of the Biden Administration and the discredited and dishonest CDC, has made its position very clear: your freedom is conditional--and they make the conditions.
Well, not on my watch.
As your Congresswoman, I will always stand for medical freedom. I will defend our Constitution and remind Washington elites that our rights come from God, NOT from government. I will stand against vaccine passports, lockdowns and mask mandates. We must be free to choose what is best for ourselves and our families.
The government's job is very simple: to protect our freedom, our borders and our national security. It's time to stand together. Together, we can turn the tide of totalitarianism that is threatening our way of life and restore America to the great nation that our founding fathers gave us.
---
|
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends, Washington State has never felt less free. Do you feel it, too? The un-scientific and draconian mask mandates are back. Our K-12 employees are being told they must get an experimental vaccine or risk losing their jobs. Our health care workers and first responders, who just a few short months ago were hailed as heroes for their front line work, are being threatened with loss of employment for simply wanting bodily autonomy. The freedom to choose what is best for their own bodies is the new civil rights issue of our day. The United States medical theocracy, under the direction of the Biden Administration and the discredited and dishonest CDC, has made its position very clear: your freedom is conditional--and they make the conditions. Well, not on my watch. As your Congresswoman, I will always stand for medical freedom. I will defend our Constitution and remind Washington elites that our rights come from God, NOT from government. I will stand against vaccine passports, lockdowns and mask mandates. We must be free to choose what is best for ourselves and our families. The government's job is very simple: to protect our freedom, our borders and our national security. It's time to stand together. Together, we can turn the tide of totalitarianism that is threatening our way of life and restore America to the great nation that our founding fathers gave us. | | | | | In The News | In case you missed Heidi's latest interviews you can catch some of our favorites at the links below.
