name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht?=
subject: Another Whipsaw Week | True the Vote Update
body:
Election Integrity News to Know | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/55dfac9defba/independence-day-newsletter-test-7232961?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
---
|

### Surrender? I have not yet begun to fight.
\- John Paul Jones
---
| | August 14, 2021

Hi Friend!

It was another whipsaw week, so let's get to it.

Starting with what we're doing at True the Vote: If you're a regular reader of our updates, you know we've continued to drop trace details about what we're working on, but overall have stayed very quiet. That's been an intentional decision. We've never stopped working, we've just stayed out of the fray. Within the next two weeks we will roll out the following:
* **IV3 - **a web-based app equipping citizens to review their local voter rolls and quickly identify problematic records, featuring automated reporting of findings to appropriate county officials, all in strict accordance with state laws. We will start beta testing next week with groups in Texas, Georgia, and Montana. Our goal is to add states slowly and be full scale by November. Any registered voter will be able to sign up to participate.
* **Open.Ink -** a research site on which we've posted all our findings from open records requests, our litigation (including litigation against us), resource materials, and best of all, a portal for other groups/individuals to post to, along with instructions on how to file open records requests. Totally transparent. We've actually had this ready for a while, but the hacks against it have been brutal, leading to our having to reconfigure our architecture...which is another story for a different day.
* **Truethevote.org** \- new branding and a new version of our website coming soon that will give us the increased flexibility we need to post daily and scale quickly, including incorporating the above programs and a lot more.

We have three other big projects underway to bring to the activist community; tools that can be used to train and organize. That's why we exist - to recruit, train, and mobilize. 2022 elections are less than 400 days away, there is no time to waste.

[We are still in court against Stacey Abrams/Fair Fight ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d106bdf9b4&e=ad8cba7e98)over 364,000 elector challenges in Georgia. We have eight additional lawsuits we are working on, but they will be under seal for a period of time, so that's all we can say about that. And lastly, we are edging ever closer to the release of our information on ballot trafficking; working with law enforcement and interviewing select national media to determine who among them is willing to report truth. Ultimately, it will all be public, one way or another.

Who knows..maybe there's a movie in the works to tell the full story of all that has and is happening with True the Vote, (hint, hint). OK, enough about us.

From newly announced 2020 election audits, to Mike Lindell's Cyber Symposium, to continued attempts by the federal government to federalize elections....people are exasperated. What should they be watching? Who can they believe? What is real? This has been an extraordinarily difficult period. Here's a way to break it down:

1\. There definitely was fraud in the 2020 elections.

2\. It was made possible by decades of broken election processes and pushed to the breaking point by the pandemic.

3\. Audits will only be useful if the goal is to evaluate broken processes and fix them. If the goal is to "flip the state" you've lost the perspective necessary to conduct a constructive audit.

4. All machines have vulnerabilities. Paper balloting has vulnerabilities. There is no perfect process. There never has been. This is true around the world. An educated, trained, engaged citizenry, working together, is the best way forward.

5. There is no single silver bullet that will be revealed, by us or anyone else, to explain the full outfall of the 2020 election. We must continue to examine processes that broke down, but making claims requires actual, material, logical, [evidence that can be evaluated by subject matter experts.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=572fd8b874&e=ad8cba7e98) It's heartbreaking to see good people like Mike Lindell caught up in grifts. (Yes, we did try to warn everyone we could, starting back as far as 2019, that there were bad actors in play. That's why we were targeted, sued, slandered, ostracized,etc. It's ok, the truth will prevail.)

6\. States are continuing to pass common sense reforms**that benefit all voters** , counter to what the InfoOp Media would have you believe. They are doing good work.[ Shout out to Texas!](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8dcdc96212&e=ad8cba7e98)

7\. Congress continues to try to federalize elections and codify catalysts for fraud, like abolishing ID requirements, institutionalizing mass mail ballots, dropboxes, and ballot harvesting. Of all the challenges we face, the legislation known as the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act pose the greatest threat to freedom. This is a hyper-partisan battle. We wish it weren't, [but the media has so contorted what is really in the bills ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=91f0d692cd&e=ad8cba7e98) that many Americans have no idea how bad it really is. [**Special shout out to Senator Ted Cruz for holding the line against their advances**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f7464cb0ea&e=ad8cba7e98)**!**

We understand how you feel. We are worn out, too. Weary of all the misinformation, betrayal, infighting, lawfare, red tape, greed, cowardice, and on and on. But, the only way we improve this situation is to keep working. Citizens will be the solution. And it will not be easy. There's hard, hard work ahead.

True the Vote is doing the most important work we’ve ever done. We can’t speak for anyone else. When our work becomes public, eyes will be opened, hopefully there will be arrests, but if not, no matter what, we must keep fighting for honest elections. There is no reason 2022 should be a repeat of 2020 - unless citizens give up. We cannot give up. Please don’t give up.

We're all in this together - and working together we really can true the vote.

Ever onward -

---
|
---
| [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0495f6466e&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
|
##
Eyes On | The IO on Election Integrity

An [article](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1dab73315d&e=ad8cba7e98) appearing in the New Yorker, written by the award-winning journalist, [Jane Mayer](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=68443f5db5&e=ad8cba7e98), recently rocked the political news cycle, painting voters pushing for statewide audits as conservative rubes. Mayer, who has done some impressive work in the past – most notably, her story, “[The Secret Sharer](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=98426ec289&e=ad8cba7e98)” that documented the government’s illegal and reckless pursuit of NSA whistleblower Thomas Drake, herself appears to have unwittingly fallen victim to an Information Operation.

In the article, Mayer attempts to discredit several new voices who’re speaking out on election integrity. Whether or not this upstart group of conservative election integrity activists are legitimately and painfully navigating the learning curve of election processes, or if they are knowingly running some huge psyop or grift, may be legitimate questions to ask. But Mayer appears to buy into something decidedly more sinister.

Mayer quotes from and places Michael Podhorzer, the AFL-CIO special advisor to the President, on a hyped-up pedestal in her article. And Podhorzer flat-out relegates those concerned with election fraud and pushing for audits as ... racists. In Mayer’s article, Podhorzer states,

“What blue-state people don’t understand about why the Big Lie works,” he said, is that it doesn’t actually require proof of fraud. “What animates it is the belief that Biden won because votes were cast by some people in this country who others think are not ‘real’ Americans.”

Mayer then legitimizes this analysis; “This anti-democratic belief has been bolstered by a constellation of established institutions on the right: “white evangelical churches, legislators, media companies, nonprofits, and even now paramilitary groups.” Podhorzer noted, “Trump won white America by eight points. He won non-urban areas by over twenty points. He _is_ the democratically elected President of white America. It’s almost like he represents a nation within a nation.”

But it’s a mistake to discredit the large percentage of people interested in election integrity this past cycle as racists. That is not what is driving the heart of this debate on the conservative side.

Most are interested because the extraordinary events of 2020 led them to question whether the process had been compromised. Why?

We watched the mass mail out of paper ballots to highly inaccurate voter records, the harried installation of ballot drop-boxes privately funded by billionaire tech magnates, the hundreds of legislative changes, lawsuits, and consent decrees that fundamentally altered election processes, and more. All of it came together in 2020, under the fog of COVID and lead to an outcome that was as historic as it was unlikely.

So, they have questions – questions that are not easy to answer.

Having studied election process for decades, our team is well aware of the pitfalls associated with the US’s uniquely insecure approach to elections. We knew that attempts to prove certain types of election malfeasance would fail, so we chose instead to focus on the frauds that would necessarily leave trackable data trails. Our team dug down on a data set of trillions of cell phone signals in highly contested states around the country to see if there were, in fact, irregularities that could equate to fraud. Post-election, no other organization has done this geofencing analysis that matches one's cell phone with an individual. By doing so, we can trace the action (such as stuffing drop boxes with ballots at 4:00 am and identify the individual signal engaged in the action.) Working with local and federal law enforcement, we built a legitimate hypothesis with data and video evidence and have been methodically advancing state by state.

So, in light of Mayer’s article, we reached out and offered the New Yorker full access to review our data for themselves, but they wanted no part of it instead. Instead, they encouraged us to take our evidence to other outfits. They didn’t want to engage at all. And therein lies the tie-in to the Information Operation. The most important rule of an Information Operation is never to engage in substantive debate, but to double down on the allegation or smear.

The Information Operation dismisses and destroys anything it cannot control. The movement for election integrity cannot be controlled. Stay alert. This is far from over.

clean_body: Election Integrity News to Know | | | | | | Surrender? I have not yet begun to fight. \- John Paul Jones | | August 14, 2021 Hi Friend! It was another whipsaw week, so let's get to it. Starting with what we're doing at True the Vote: If you're a regular reader of our updates, you know we've continued to drop trace details about what we're working on, but overall have stayed very quiet. That's been an intentional decision. We've never stopped working, we've just stayed out of the fray. Within the next two weeks we will roll out the following: IV3 - a web-based app equipping citizens to review their local voter rolls and quickly identify problematic records, featuring automated reporting of findings to appropriate county officials, all in strict accordance with state laws. We will start beta testing next week with groups in Texas, Georgia, and Montana. Our goal is to add states slowly and be full scale by November. Any registered voter will be able to sign up to participate. Open.Ink - a research site on which we've posted all our findings from open records requests, our litigation (including litigation against us), resource materials, and best of all, a portal for other groups/individuals to post to, along with instructions on how to file open records requests. Totally transparent. We've actually had this ready for a while, but the hacks against it have been brutal, leading to our having to reconfigure our architecture...which is another story for a different day. Truethevote.org \- new branding and a new version of our website coming soon that will give us the increased flexibility we need to post daily and scale quickly, including incorporating the above programs and a lot more. We have three other big projects underway to bring to the activist community; tools that can be used to train and organize. That's why we exist - to recruit, train, and mobilize. 2022 elections are less than 400 days away, there is no time to waste. 364,000 elector challenges in Georgia. We have eight additional lawsuits we are working on, but they will be under seal for a period of time, so that's all we can say about that. And lastly, we are edging ever closer to the release of our information on ballot trafficking; working with law enforcement and interviewing select national media to determine who among them is willing to report truth. Ultimately, it will all be public, one way or another. Who knows..maybe there's a movie in the works to tell the full story of all that has and is happening with True the Vote, (hint, hint). OK, enough about us. From newly announced 2020 election audits, to Mike Lindell's Cyber Symposium, to continued attempts by the federal government to federalize elections....people are exasperated. What should they be watching? Who can they believe? What is real? This has been an extraordinarily difficult period. Here's a way to break it down: 1\. There definitely was fraud in the 2020 elections. 2\. It was made possible by decades of broken election processes and pushed to the breaking point by the pandemic. 3\. Audits will only be useful if the goal is to evaluate broken processes and fix them. If the goal is to "flip the state" you've lost the perspective necessary to conduct a constructive audit. 4. All machines have vulnerabilities. Paper balloting has vulnerabilities. There is no perfect process. There never has been. This is true around the world. An educated, trained, engaged citizenry, working together, is the best way forward. 5. There is no single silver bullet that will be revealed, by us or anyone else, to explain the full outfall of the 2020 election. We must continue to examine processes that broke down, but making claims requires actual, material, logical, It's heartbreaking to see good people like Mike Lindell caught up in grifts. (Yes, we did try to warn everyone we could, starting back as far as 2019, that there were bad actors in play. That's why we were targeted, sued, slandered, ostracized,etc. It's ok, the truth will prevail.) 6\. States are continuing to pass common sense reformsthat benefit all voters , counter to what the InfoOp Media would have you believe. They are doing good work. 7\. Congress continues to try to federalize elections and codify catalysts for fraud, like abolishing ID requirements, institutionalizing mass mail ballots, dropboxes, and ballot harvesting. Of all the challenges we face, the legislation known as the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act pose the greatest threat to freedom. This is a hyper-partisan battle. We wish it weren't, that many Americans have no idea how bad it really is. ! We understand how you feel. We are worn out, too. Weary of all the misinformation, betrayal, infighting, lawfare, red tape, greed, cowardice, and on and on. But, the only way we improve this situation is to keep working. Citizens will be the solution. And it will not be easy. There's hard, hard work ahead. True the Vote is doing the most important work we’ve ever done. We can’t speak for anyone else. When our work becomes public, eyes will be opened, hopefully there will be arrests, but if not, no matter what, we must keep fighting for honest elections. There is no reason 2022 should be a repeat of 2020 - unless citizens give up. We cannot give up. Please don’t give up. We're all in this together - and working together we really can true the vote. Ever onward - | | | | Eyes On | The IO on Election Integrity An appearing in the New Yorker, written by the award-winning journalist, , recently rocked the political news cycle, painting voters pushing for statewide audits as conservative rubes. Mayer, who has done some impressive work in the past – most notably, her story, “” that documented the government’s illegal and reckless pursuit of NSA whistleblower Thomas Drake, herself appears to have unwittingly fallen victim to an Information Operation. In the article, Mayer attempts to discredit several new voices who’re speaking out on election integrity. Whether or not this upstart group of conservative election integrity activists are legitimately and painfully navigating the learning curve of election processes, or if they are knowingly running some huge psyop or grift, may be legitimate questions to ask. But Mayer appears to buy into something decidedly more sinister. Mayer quotes from and places Michael Podhorzer, the AFL-CIO special advisor to the President, on a hyped-up pedestal in her article. And Podhorzer flat-out relegates those concerned with election fraud and pushing for audits as ... racists. In Mayer’s article, Podhorzer states, “What blue-state people don’t understand about why the Big Lie works,” he said, is that it doesn’t actually require proof of fraud. “What animates it is the belief that Biden won because votes were cast by some people in this country who others think are not ‘real’ Americans.” Mayer then legitimizes this analysis; “This anti-democratic belief has been bolstered by a constellation of established institutions on the right: “white evangelical churches, legislators, media companies, nonprofits, and even now paramilitary groups.” Podhorzer noted, “Trump won white America by eight points. He won non-urban areas by over twenty points. He is the democratically elected President of white America. It’s almost like he represents a nation within a nation.” But it’s a mistake to discredit the large percentage of people interested in election integrity this past cycle as racists. That is not what is driving the heart of this debate on the conservative side. Most are interested because the extraordinary events of 2020 led them to question whether the process had been compromised. Why? We watched the mass mail out of paper ballots to highly inaccurate voter records, the harried installation of ballot drop-boxes privately funded by billionaire tech magnates, the hundreds of legislative changes, lawsuits, and consent decrees that fundamentally altered election processes, and more. All of it came together in 2020, under the fog of COVID and lead to an outcome that was as historic as it was unlikely. So, they have questions – questions that are not easy to answer. Having studied election process for decades, our team is well aware of the pitfalls associated with the US’s uniquely insecure approach to elections. We knew that attempts to prove certain types of election malfeasance would fail, so we chose instead to focus on the frauds that would necessarily leave trackable data trails. Our team dug down on a data set of trillions of cell phone signals in highly contested states around the country to see if there were, in fact, irregularities that could equate to fraud. Post-election, no other organization has done this geofencing analysis that matches one's cell phone with an individual. By doing so, we can trace the action (such as stuffing drop boxes with ballots at 4:00 am and identify the individual signal engaged in the action.) Working with local and federal law enforcement, we built a legitimate hypothesis with data and video evidence and have been methodically advancing state by state. So, in light of Mayer’s article, we reached out and offered the New Yorker full access to review our data for themselves, but they wanted no part of it instead. Instead, they encouraged us to take our evidence to other outfits. They didn’t want to engage at all. And therein lies the tie-in to the Information Operation. The most important rule of an Information Operation is never to engage in substantive debate, but to double down on the allegation or smear. The Information Operation dismisses and destroys anything it cannot control. The movement for election integrity cannot be controlled. Stay alert. This is far from over. | | "HELP SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY " | | Check Us Out On Insta! Want to see Election Integrity convos served up a whole new way? Here's the situation, Peter.

The summer is a difficult time for fundraising, and as a result, we've fallen a little behind where we need to be for August. That's why we set a goal to raise $10,000 before our mid-month fundraising deadline to get back on track, but with only a few hours left, we're still a bit short of our goal.

Republicans only need to flip five seats to take back the House majority and they've named Kim a top target. We know national Republicans and our Trump-supporting opponents will spend whatever it takes to win, so hitting our mid-month goal is crucial to ensuring we have the resources to fight back.

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under attack from the Woke Mob
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132890:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132890:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132890:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132890:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, friend. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132890:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132890:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132890:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132890:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132892:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132891:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58132893:6WOhJ5lFN:m:1:3253819041:9592A375270E82A0EC26A7C127F54933:r)

clean_body: Hi Peter, Bo Dietl here. You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like Goodfellas and T he Wolf of Wall Street. But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me. Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. That's when the two men sped away. Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. We’re losing NH. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWpDUDB8RNtzlaizpIsZY2TwCdQS97dFYcpqc1BI4l-SN9k5BTxT3g4X8jaS38j3cXoX5qKFCPzHv3Dk99SsvTIrvWcDgSmqv2uA95GUNodNPpa7mATDLmJP9oRCJj_fpDNs2LyEFky-te5rqU_N5elqYOHmRKPhpohR9e3V37dDmTTxRNVzf37Yuxm78eLAAW9X1uK6Xabx2NeWAsxBRgmXLBxyj2R1hQGZG5hARfmXSZJNzSOmTYKs4Pcgn7Y7fzJ8HT6LOtJMgIwurTALx1Jo/3eh/Pnjn5ij2ScG0CPIL_iw12g/h0/Y1ScuZl0JkWAr0v2ig31TCKDZxxoBCOot8AiKPQahWo)
Derek,

I need your help now that Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have decided that defeating me in New Hampshire is the fastest way to put Republicans back in charge of the Senate. They're even personally recruiting my 2022 opponent.

Mitch McConnell's cronies are attacking me on TV. One McConnell-linked group has targeted me as part of a multi-million dollar ad campaign. And it’s working -- **a WMUR poll that recently came out has me DOWN by ONE POINT.**

Right now, we’re falling behind on our goal. **[Will you please split $25 or whatever you can between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us make up ground?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWpDUDB8RNtzlaizpIsZY2Tz-0cLsKNRF4GK65oqOKA_zYnuWSsaNJLhN_CX3VMARFcekI5f1pLz7eFaRg-C_Gksls3_7JXK_ZtMxVJb6GoWjDz5sm-3T1Sx_GALXvBUPN9JTIKbl0W1DOEOEa9CTXeuYcwAoz9I5gybFDVpCmnW-icrgQ-3hCHztiV7mzk7UYskQdmJv3B9dVjuvv9ApClst03ut1SEdOop41tI1kej1cCahVkwX2TFNOPoj7RGzAEYuf4UXOhAWmTt__hiIZJw/3eh/Pnjn5ij2ScG0CPIL_iw12g/h1/V5mH-A6F2wAbkdu7VarDtGkLEeFK1Dd1pjRKzxwUvX8)**

McConnell and his buddies have promised that more ads are coming. It’s no surprise _The Boston Globe_ called me the “most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for reelection.”

_This is no time for my grassroots support to dip._

If we stumble now, we’ll hand the Republicans a huge talking point. More outside money will pour into New Hampshire. Our opponents will step up their attacks.

**Republicans only need to flip one seat to regain Senate control, and right now, polls show that they could flip my seat in New Hampshire.**

If they defeat us and take back the Senate, there will be no progress on issues like jobs, voting rights, climate change, and protecting a woman’s right to choose.

name: Marco's iPhone
subject: sorry for the late email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
---
Sorry for the late email, friend. I promise this is the last time you'll hear from me before our huge mid-month fundraising deadline, but I had to reach out one last time to our top supporters because we're still short of tonight's goal.
I mean it when I say the stakes are getting higher every day, and it's becoming more critical than ever that we be in position to win. We cannot hand our children and grandchildren an Arizona that never reached its own potential. We can't be content to let our families struggle and our votes be silenced. We owe it to every single person in this state to do _better_ than what our failed GOP leaders think is good enough.
But whether or not we defeat the rising extremism in our state and finally get back on track – that comes down to moments like _this_. **So I have to ask: Please, friend, can you chip in $5, $25, whatever you can spare, to hit our mid-month goal by midnight and keep pushing to flip Arizona blue?**

**Here's the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/marco-lopez-for-governor_email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34118796/300965966/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk179-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzQ1YjA3Zi0yMWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhqFltkB9uf_gZ06V977d7J1qs4L541QnPKGcFV7rjA=)**
Thank you for never giving up,

Marco
\--------Forwarded Message--------
From: **Marco Lopez (D)**
Date: Fri, Aug 13, 2021
Subject: What we do for our democracy right now will be felt for generations
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34118797/300965967/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk179-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzQ1YjA3Zi0yMWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhqFltkB9uf_gZ06V977d7J1qs4L541QnPKGcFV7rjA=)
---
Friend, I'll get right to it: **Donald Trump recently visited Arizona to spread lies about the 2020 election, defend the GOP's sham election audit and keep this battleground state red. If we don't fight back now, I'm worried our entire movement to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue could be in serious danger. **

That's why we set an ambitious mid-month fundraising goal – so that we have the resources we need to fight back against Trump's lies, defend our state and finally elect a Democratic governor. Cawthorn just held a massive $50,000-per-plate fundraising dinner alongside Donald Trump. From attending ritzy out-of-state fundraising events to amplifying hateful rhetoric, Cawthorn will pander to the worst interests to fund his campaign. But we won’t slow down either. name: Karen Bass
subject: She's bragging. So let's set the record straight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
There's a reason we set fundraising goals, team.

RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel is bragging that Donald Trump is still leading the Republican party behind the scenes. We already know what Trump's leadership does to this country -- it sows division and endangers American lives.

Trump may no longer be president, but his allies are still in Congress, and they're preparing to spend everything it takes to win back the House majority. My team says we are still $2,042 short of tonight's mid-month goal. Will you chip in at this personal link to help us close the gap?

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-aug21&refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/_EJKMI8YWq4VgG8F46BBLpUWfLGZx9rVa5O6KScwxbY=/Vn3f3-RpdCStiZfZn490o05dy6m7QzJVY08AOQl3jNo=?gpsid=39_132_20132&refcode=em21_210815_mm3_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210815_mm3_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

We need to expand our Democratic majorities and defeat Trump's allies in the midterms. It's the only path forward for our country.

But listen, the GOP is reporting record fundraising numbers right now, so we are counting on every single donation that comes in. Our fight for social and economic justice is as strong as this movement. I'm turning to you now, team.

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-aug21&refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/_EJKMI8YWq4VgG8F46BBLpUWfLGZx9rVa5O6KScwxbY=/Vn3f3-RpdCStiZfZn490o05dy6m7QzJVY08AOQl3jNo=?gpsid=39_132_20132&refcode=em21_210815_mm3_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210815_mm3_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

In solidarity,

Karen

My team says we are still $2,042 short of tonight's mid-month goal. Will you chip in at this personal link to help us close the gap? We need to expand our Democratic majorities and defeat Trump's allies in the midterms. It's the only path forward for our country. But listen, the GOP is reporting record fundraising numbers right now, so we are counting on every single donation that comes in. | | | Dear Peter, I am writing to you today to thank you for your generous support. I never take for granted your assistance. The more support I get, however, the better able I am to be an America First warrior and stand up to the cancel culture vultures that surround me from the left and the right. Many crazed liberal Democrats here in Washington, along with their public relations people in the far-left media, have viciously attacked me for months. They have called me a “dangerous extremist,” a “white supremacist,” and all kinds of other false and defamatory nonsense. **Some have even called for my removal from Congress**. The reason for their rabid attacks is that I am an America First patriot, and I refuse to accept their false narrative about January 6. Facts are coming to light that the FBI might have had a hand in planning and carrying out that event. The only person who was murdered that day was Senior Airman Ashli Babbitt, a war veteran and mother. She was executed in cold blood by an unidentified killer. Despite the attacks from the crazed left, I will not stop asking questions until I get truthful answers about the events of that day. It is in times like these when your support is more valuable than you know. You have donated to my reelection campaign, shared my messages on social media and with friends and family, volunteered, and stood with me in my effort to find the truth. For that, I am more grateful than you know. [I won’t back down, and I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can to my re-election campaign, whether it’s $5, $50, or $500, to help me continue in my mission to fight the radical left’s bogus narrative, and put America First](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=fb0b1a5fc3&e=645b3b1338).

clean_body: We are so close to our Mid-Month fundraising goal, Fellow Conservative, but we need YOUR donation if we want to reach it. The House Conservatives Fund is working to get hard working, well rounded conservatives elected into office. By doing this, we will promote America First values including: [1]Back the Blue. We fight to protect our men and women law enforcement officers who deserve the utmost respect and safety. [2]Ending mask mandates. Masks serve a purpose when they are needed. Right now, the pandemic is ending and masks for vaccinated individuals are unnecessary. [3]Protecting our Borders.** The southern border crisis is the largest humanitarian crisis in America today. HCF-backed public servants want to resume construction on the wall and promote proper vetting of immigrants. [4]**Stopping Socialism. Nancy Pelosi has become increasingly radicalized and her role as House Speaker is one veto away from full dictatorship. We will put an end to her partisanisms and to the increasing threat of socialism in our government. The left has completely lost their way. House Conservatives Fund is working to put America back on track and we’re counting on you to join us, Fellow Conservative. Thank you, House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. www.houseconservatives.com

clean_body: Please respond TODAY | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | --- ]() Democratic turnout in the 2020 Election was historic, We have to start shaping strategy to save mail-in voting | | | We appreciate your response! \-- Ruiz Research Team | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Hi -- this will only take a minute. **Our mid-month deadline is at midnight tonight** and so far our fundraising has been pretty lackluster. We really don't want to have to give Senator Hassan the bad news that we fell short. The truth is, Maggie is the most vulnerable Democratic Senator, and Mitch McConnell knows that the path to the majority runs straight through New Hampshire. That’s why super PACs are spending big on attack ads and **far-right Republicans like Mike Pence and Betsy DeVos are already hitting the campaign trail in the Granite State.** **[It’s not an exaggeration when we say that missing just one goal could cost us the Senate majority. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: need input, not money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Can you spare just 3O seconds and let me know what's on your mind? | | | I hate to bother you on Sunday, but this is critical:

There are just **seven ****hours** left until my August Priorities Survey closes for good, and I'm still missing your input.

Feedback from grassroots supporters like you is what powered our wins in 2O2O, and it's what will defend our Majority from aggressive Republican attacks next year.

**Let me be clear: All the momentum and money in the world won 't matter if my House Democratic colleagues and I aren't able to run a campaign powered by your on-the-ground priorities and perspectives.**

That's why, before my survey closes in just seven hours, I have to ask one last time:

_Can you spare just 3O seconds and let me know what 's on your mind?_

[**https://action.dccc.org/survey/august-2021-priority-survey**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw9~)
---

Thanks for your input,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45463010&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MzUwMTMxNAS2&l=13888526&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45463010&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MzUwMTMxNAS2&l=13888526&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Pramila Jayapal HQ
subject: Not loving this trend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, we’re not loving this trend:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210815?refcode=em20210815-545&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=545_420207_wgI-n2&akid=545%2E420207%2EwgI-n2)
That graphic might not mean much to you, so let us explain: We're almost halfway through August, and we’re lagging behind what we raised at this time last month. **But, if we can raise $15,00 by midnight tomorrow, we'll be back on track in no time.**
[**Grassroots donors like you make Pramila’s bold advocacy for progressive priorities — and our movement to support her — possible. Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, toward our mid-month goal today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210815?refcode=em20210815-545&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=545_420207_wgI-n2&akid=545%2E420207%2EwgI-n2)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210815?refcode=em20210815-545&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=545_420207_wgI-n2&akid=545%2E420207%2EwgI-n2)**
We’re officially in the dog days of summer, which means people spend less time in front of screens reading emails like this one and more time with loved ones.
That’s great, but it _also_ means our primary source of the revenue that fuels our organizing is drying up at a critical moment in the fight for child care, paid leave, education, Medicare expansion, a roadmap to citizenship, affordable housing, climate action, lower prescription drug prices, and so much more.
[**So if you can afford it at this time, chip in $3 or more toward our mid-month goal of $15,000 to power our people-powered movement forward. It’s going to be a busy fall, and we can’t afford to fall short.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210815?refcode=em20210815-545&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=545_420207_wgI-n2&akid=545%2E420207%2EwgI-n2)
Thank you for your support,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210815-545-footer&t=24&refcode2=545_420207_wgI-n2&akid=545%2E420207%2EwgI-n2)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: My chances of winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
CNN has named me one of the most vulnerable senators in the nation. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGl9zIQzyDLjnAgw3YsbhyQ_iWUmwg9y9E5m2tjHX1ftZrwxZ1ZL2tlNLPa5jj0Md8MteEX80YfGi5VVH0Ge3GegR34MpDDCjtzCagIU2JZYU9WS3CYMDc1Oeq1-IGBtPzS0zgW2w1fvN8GNJj-BtFXGLN8OCyvEw_MHriEMvMoO2c2dXAANpJ9L_sngLrUE5hNdhEn5RaBMHDxWFC9K78nlwvWbaZiHPQMWobjlcaDkWE-S02bhHa1QINQ3PCU35HCMYNwtRVJtzk-EGGtFK4II/3eh/FbDNjSaZQI2f5Oi6pOEVVw/h0/M9fBHxGbhy4DjySekI3i-ewV2h_O5llSDHIVstI1acM) Derek, I wish I was reaching out with good news, but CNN has named me one of the **most vulnerable senators in the nation.**

GOP outside groups have _already_ spent nearly $1 million to flip this seat – and The Cook Political Report just _downgraded_ my chances of winning Nevada's critical Senate race.

Let me be very clear: Senate control hinges on what happens in Nevada – and I'm about to fall short of my urgent rapid-response goal.

That's why I'm turning to you, Derek: I won by just 2 points in 2016, and I cannot afford to miss this goal or lose any ground. Races in Nevada are always tough, so I'm counting on you.

I wouldn't ask you personally like this if it weren't important. I need to raise another $6,275 by midnight – and I can't miss this goal. **With Senate control on the line, every single dollar today could mean the difference between winning and losing tomorrow.**

**[Please, Derek, will you split a $25 donation between my campaign and Common Good VA right now to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGl9zIQzyDLjnAgw3YsbhyQ9yG2jnh4Q1q4WkjmWCAw4ywrXFEVi30507qYjzIkFgsYS-nCEuK-5KVnKFNGr-hlVVwWpPHxEmIefojpdkh1Q2DZ8u2SjUt8CvwcdpHe5t0dcUzQfN83M0FZQEsjZuQLtD0JwM_-E6HVPudYWFswVAzKJhf6-t4TLKnNQtPhFvNXscf_5WW2pFTxyGnKnD4RGyflzD0Fez6hfXNyDR0FHMHCZ02gG_LAWfrMnRqpzmyyTe8uXBNVmEtAOgKDhwPag8Db6Cg4wetvxy89qnVtnA/3eh/FbDNjSaZQI2f5Oi6pOEVVw/h1/kQs5NSR_yYiTwi8FTrOnnvIfPzfExC9fDp5nONlalvQ)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGl9zIQzyDLjnAgw3YsbhyQ9yG2jnh4Q1q4WkjmWCAw4yYMFVWabhQNiW1vtVGy15Quw50WGYoJIAtvzjqn1dasO0ns4xfJEr5J2VjqHD7HvenPWL8rTxW_tJmPvylzZG2xEaTGo2qJ_br8PteFOJVzHNXmHU6IotUs-33Z0eRuavNq-ypylSz_afeFIc06u7YlGDb6Hhw9IZoqQLotXyvGfutUsZNjBuoucmo8FoEhewQV59fHv2dlmW666ctPvJHvC3yv2OEW0hSeAnUmcOpw00J-LYbFHvEwH4Cdgf0SCr/3eh/FbDNjSaZQI2f5Oi6pOEVVw/h2/WNu2h0wItI6PGJ7rZ2pzMntuhahf2vDlTFM-wzvN5XA)
